judge_reason: Description B describes a typed memorandum as the primary visual content, while Description A only describes a stamp, and they also contradict on the initial within the stamp ('R' vs 'W').
original_image_tags: Stamped box in lower right corner. Top line: "FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION". Second line: "U.S. DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE". Date stamp: "JUL 30 1947". Location: "SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA". Below location: "ROUTED TO". To the right of "ROUTED TO": a stamped initial "R".
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A single scanned typewritten FBI memorandum page titled “UNIDENTIFIABLE OBJECTS,” dated Williams Field, Chandler, Ariz., 15 July 1947, with a Federal Bureau of Investigation stamp at the lower right and handwritten initials/signature at the lower left.*
